'''Jubel''' was the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] clerk who aided [[Cornelius Evazan/Legends|Cornelius Evazan]] at the [[Cutting Edge Clinic]] at [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].<ref name="GG7" />
